## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.13.7

### Camera Recording Notifications
- Moves generated recording links to a hidden Home Assistant frontend playback route for Companion app notification taps.
- Keeps the existing authenticated X-Sense playback page behind that frontend route.
- Updates the camera event blueprint wording to match the Motion event entity attribute path.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the generated playback route and hidden frontend panel registration.
- Confirms the camera stream implementation files remain unchanged for this prerelease.
